propLst.prop: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-16"?> <state xmlns:p="urn:proj"> <publish activetargetindex="0" activetargetindexprefix="a360_" p:directory="" /> <exThreeSixtyTargetPublishScope scope="project" guid="00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000" /> <exThreeSixtyTarget p:format="HTML5" p:ios="0" p:offline="1" /> <exWebTargetPublishScope scope="project" guid="00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000" /> <exWebTarget p:format="HTML5" p:ios="0" p:offline="1" /> <exVideoTargetPublishScope scope="project" guid="00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000" /> <exVideoTarget p:format="HTML5" p:ios="0" p:offline="1" /> <VideoTarget dimensions="0" videoQuality="2" audioQuality="2" isNormalized="False" isNextButtonHonored="False" /> <publishtoword> <options showlayers="true" screenshotsize="0" shownotes="true" /> </publishtoword> <LMSLRSTargetPublishScope scope="project" guid="00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000" /> <LMSLRSTarget p:format="HTML5" p:ios="0" p:offline="1" /><lms xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" type="Scorm1_2" edition="Edition2" reporting="PassedIncomplete"><course><ver>1</ver><duration /><url>http://www.servername.com/story/index_lms.html</url></course><lesson><id>TemplateExample1</id></lesson><trackingData><trackingmode>def</trackingmode><slidesviewed>-1</slidesviewed><quizslideid /></trackingData><ReportToLms>true</ReportToLms><LrsData><reportToLrs>false</reportToLrs><configurationMode>QueryString</configurationMode><actorMode>QueryString</actorMode><actorJavaScriptType>StaticAccount</actorJavaScriptType></LrsData></lms><ftp server="" port="21" anonymous="0" email="" username="" password="" p:directory="" uuid="ca321675-f1d8-44bf-a959-881bf0d9c11d" /><global_publishcompression><option value="web" jpeg="100" audio="48" video="5" normalizeAudio="0" adaptiveVideo="True" /></global_publishcompression></state>

evt.name:
Welcome to Storyline 360
We're constantly dropping new features and enhancements to help you: Easily create powerful online learning for your LMS Bring concepts to life with custom interactions that keep learners engaged Build courses faster with in-app access to millions of royalty-free design and multimedia assets
Explore our What’s New page to learn more
Join the E-Learning Heroes community for weekly challenges, examples, and enlightening discussions with other Articulate 360 course creators.

Welcome to Storyline 360
We're constantly dropping new features and enhancements to help you: Easily create powerful online learning for your LMS Bring concepts to life with custom interactions that keep learners engaged Build courses faster with in-app access to millions of royalty-free design and multimedia assets
Explore our What’s New page to learn more
Join the E-Learning Heroes community for weekly challenges, examples, and enlightening discussions with other Articulate 360 course creators.
